segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a narrow Gothic castle corridor with ribbed stone vaulting overhead. Warm torchlight illuminates the stone walls covered with various framed portraits. An arched doorway remains centered in the distance while different painted figures in ornate frames slide into view as the perspective shifts along the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow Gothic corridor that draws the viewer toward a distant architectural focal point. It begins by gliding beneath ribbed stone vaulting, where warm torchlight casts a flickering glow across the textured walls. As the camera advances, various framed portraits slide into view, their ornate borders passing by as the perspective shifts along the hallway. The scene then maintains its steady forward momentum, keeping a centered arched doorway in sight as the surrounding stone environment unfolds.
